# The minimal CLI prints help and exits successfully.
exec mina
stdout 'Mina local-first personal finance API'
stdout 'Usage:'
! stderr .

exec mina help serve
stdout 'Serve the REST API'
stdout '--db'
stdout '--host'
stdout '--port'
stdout '--yes'
stdout '--schema'
stdout '--access-log'
stdout '--quiet'
! stderr .

# The minimal CLI prints a stable development version.
exec mina --version
stdout 'mina 0.0.0-dev'
! stderr .
